caption: A group of individuals wearing blue hairnets and pink gloves are engaged in the traditional Korean communal activity of making kimchi, with vibrant red chili paste and fresh napa cabbage spread across a large table.

The image depicts a person wearing an apron and black gloves, actively engaged in the traditional Korean communal practice of making kimjang, as they handle salted napa cabbage and red chili paste within a large glass bowl on a wooden table.
A group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok are gathered outdoors, waving the Taegeukgi, the national flag of Korea, in a display of unity and celebration.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional and modern attire, with some holding documents and others waving the Taegeukgi, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.

The image depicts a person adorned in a vibrant red hanbok with intricate floral patterns, standing in a traditional Korean setting, possibly during a wedding ceremony, as suggested by the elaborate attire and the presence of a wooden mandarin duck.

In a traditional Korean setting, a couple dressed in vibrant hanboks partake in a ceremonial exchange, seated opposite each other at a ritual table adorned with wooden mandarin ducks and candles, under the watchful eyes of two onlookers.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) setup with a variety of food offerings on a wooden table, including fruits, pastries, and rice cakes, arranged in an orderly fashion, reflecting the cultural emphasis on respect and reverence for ancestors.
In a traditional Korean setting, a family gathers around a ritual table adorned with various food offerings, performing deep bows as part of an ancestral rite known as Jesa.
The image depicts a group of individuals participating in a traditional Korean grave-tending rite (Seongmyo) at a serene outdoor location, with a statue in the background and a clear sky above.

The image depicts a group of seven men dressed in formal black suits and ties, participating in a traditional Korean grave-tending ceremony known as "Seongmyo," where they are bowing respectfully at a grave site adorned with white flowers and a South Korean flag, surrounded by neatly trimmed hedges and a cloudy sky.
The image depicts the Cheomseongdae observatory, a historical Korean structure illuminated at night, showcasing its distinctive cylindrical shape with a square top frame, set against a dark sky.
The image depicts the Cheomseongdae observatory, a historical Korean structure with a cylindrical stone tower topped with a square frame, situated in an open field under a clear sky.

The image showcases the Gyeongbokgung Palace at night, featuring its traditional wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and elevated stone platforms, all under a deep blue sky.

The image showcases the Gyeongbokgung Palace, a traditional Korean royal palace, featuring wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and elevated stone platforms, all under a clear blue sky.
The image captures the serene beauty of Cheonggyecheon, an urban stream in Seoul, with its clear waters flowing over rocks amidst lush greenery and modern buildings in the background.

The image depicts a serene urban scene featuring a prominent statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin, a Korean naval hero, standing tall amidst a modern cityscape with fountains in the foreground and trees lining the pathway.

Jeol and Sebae, two individuals dressed in black, are performing a traditional Korean formal deep bow known as Jeol and Sebae, kneeling on a wooden floor with their hands touching the ground, facing each other in a respectful and solemn manner.
The image depicts a family scene where two children are performing a Jeol and Sebae, a traditional Korean bow, while an adult sits nearby, observing.

Jeol and Sebae, a traditional Korean greeting, are being performed by four individuals dressed in vibrant hanboks, with two children and two adults, seated on a patterned rug in a cozy living room setting.

The image depicts a group of individuals standing in front of a large statue of Sejongdaewang, the King Sejong the Great, who is seated on a throne-like chair adorned with a winged crown, set against a backdrop of a clear sky and distant mountains.
The image depicts a statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, seated in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, situated in an urban setting at dusk, illuminated by artificial lighting.
A person is flying a large, colorful kite shaped like a rectangle with a long tail, characteristic of Yeon-nalligi, in an open grassy field under a partly cloudy sky.
A person is flying a rainbow-colored kite in a park, with trees and a clear sky in the background.
A group of elderly individuals is engaged in playing Yutnori, a traditional Korean board game, with vibrant floral patterns on the game board and wooden yut sticks placed at the center.

The image depicts two children dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, engaging in the traditional Korean board game Yutnori, with wooden yut sticks mid-air above them, and a game board laid out before them on the floor.

The image captures a vibrant scene of Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, with dancers in black and white hanboks forming a large circle on a wooden platform, set against the backdrop of a picturesque bridge and clear blue sky.

The image depicts a group of women performing the Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, dressed in vibrant red and blue hanboks, gracefully moving in a circular formation under a full moon.

The image depicts a performer dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a yellow top with purple accents and a blue skirt, engaging in a mask dance known as Talchum, characterized by its vibrant colors and expressive movements.

The image displays an array of colorful and intricately designed masks, each with unique facial expressions and patterns, arranged in a grid-like fashion against a metal backdrop, reminiscent of traditional Korean mask dances known as Talchum.

The image showcases a bowl of ramyeon, a traditional Korean dish, with its characteristic yellow curly noodles and vibrant orange-red broth, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim of the bowl, set against a wooden table backdrop.
The image showcases a bowl of ramyeon, a popular Korean instant noodle dish, alongside a container of kimchi, a traditional Korean side dish made from fermented vegetables.
The image showcases a box filled with neatly arranged gimbap, featuring vibrant fillings such as cucumber, carrots, and shrimp, all wrapped in dark green seaweed and topped with sesame seeds.
The image displays a plate of panfried battered meatballs, known as Wanja-jeon, arranged in a casual manner on a white paper-lined plate, showcasing their golden-brown color and round shape.
The image showcases a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring small decorative pieces in pastel colors with pressed floral or geometric patterns, arranged neatly in a tray.

The image showcases a box filled with an assortment of colorful hangwa, traditional Korean confections, arranged in neat rows and columns, each piece adorned with small decorative pieces and pressed floral patterns.

The image showcases a traditional Korean dish called Yaksik, featuring a mound of dark-brown, glossy sticky glutinous rice mixed with chestnuts, jujubes, and pine nuts, presented in a white bowl on a checkered cloth atop a green bamboo mat.

The image displays a plate of Yakgwa, a traditional Korean honey cookie, featuring small, flower-shaped pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, arranged neatly on a white plate with green leaves and yellow flowers as garnish.

The image showcases a traditional Korean dish known as Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced marinated beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, arranged on a large, round, metal serving platter, accompanied by various vegetables and garnishes.

The image showcases a traditional Korean New Year dish known as Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili peppers, and a sprinkle of seaweed.

The image displays a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.

The image showcases a plate of Japchae, featuring translucent brown noodles interwoven with vibrant orange carrots, green spinach, and white onions, all garnished with sesame seeds, creating a visually appealing and appetizing presentation.

The image showcases a traditional Korean pavilion with vibrant red pillars and green roof tiles, set against a backdrop of clear blue skies and lush autumn foliage, embodying the essence of a serene and historic site.

The image showcases a serene view of Haenggung, a traditional Korean temporary royal palace, featuring wooden structures with curved tile roofs and vibrant dancheong-painted eaves, arranged harmoniously within a lush green courtyard.
The image depicts the Paldalmun Gate, a traditional Korean gate characterized by its arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion, flanked by curved fortress walls, and adorned with red flags.

The image showcases the EXPO Hanbit Tower, a prominent Korean landmark, with its distinctive white observation tower featuring a disc-shaped deck and a pointed spire, set against a backdrop of lush green hills under an overcast sky.
The image depicts a group of soldiers gathered around military vehicles in a rural setting, with greenery and mountains in the background, likely representing a scene from the Korean War era.
The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, indicative of a post-war Korean cityscape.

The image depicts a serene village scene with traditional Korean architecture, people engaged in daily activities, and a tranquil body of water reflecting the surroundings, set against a backdrop of lush green hills under a clear blue sky.
A family engages in the traditional Korean shuttlecock-kicking game, jegichagi, on a sunny day amidst blooming cherry blossoms.

The image depicts a young boy dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a pink vest over a white shirt and gray pants, kicking a blue shuttlecock in mid-air during a jegichagi game, showcasing the dynamic motion of the sport.
